name: aiden-tasks
description: Create/find/update your AIDEN (clicktrackerx.com) tasks via the /aiden-tasks:aiden command + MCP tools (OAuth login, no key). Plus /aiden-tasks:aiden-vault to pull a task/project credential from your AIDEN vault and apply it safely (git push, deploy key, env). Optional per-branch session auto-logging (needs a per-user key).
